title: Compare length
description: Compare the height or length of two objects by looking at them.

hints:
The caterpillar is longer.

![A caterpillar. The caterpillar is longer than the bug.  ](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b1f537570f68140b3eac728fdcc11e5d.png)

The shark is longer.

![A shark.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/24b82030c2b28618829e28fb9f5c2b8c.png)

Let's line them up to see.

![A banana.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f9055af3b45d76cf80459fade39fcb8f.png)

![An apple.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1ee39e265aae4e3a254bcb0465a63979.png)

The banana is longer.

![A banana.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f9055af3b45d76cf80459fade39fcb8f.png)

Let's line them up.  
![A dress with a short skirt.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7e76378ddccc72c2ee591b607f148bc8.png)![A dress with a long skirt.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1123f2f0d647b17f485b98c49e689a30.png)

This dress is longer.

![A dress with a long skirt.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1123f2f0d647b17f485b98c49e689a30.png)

The bat is longer.

![A bat with the wings spread out.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/67b6b180cc7076fbe408fc7e64d4363d.png)
